name: View Transitions — types & CSS classes
description: Tag navigations with `addTransitionType('nav-forward'|'nav-back'|...)` inside `startTransition` before `router.push`. Map types to classes via object props on `enter`/`exit`/`share` with required `default: "none"` for TS and to avoid accidental auto cross-fade. Style via `::view-transition-old(.cls)`, `::view-transition-new(.cls)`, `::view-transition-group(.cls)`, `::view-transition-image-pair(.cls)`. `router.back()` / browser history `popstate` do not participate — use explicit `router.push` URLs for animated back.

metadata.intent: Use transition types and CSS class maps safely and predictably

must_not: Use type maps for Suspense-only reveals (no types on that transition)
conventions: Stack multiple `addTransitionType` calls when multiple VT subtrees need different styling.

steps.description: For hierarchical forward/back, call `addTransitionType('nav-forward'|'nav-back')` inside the same `startTransition` as navigation.
Replace `router.back()` animated flows with `router.push(explicitUrl)` when view transitions are required (sync popstate limitation).
Target animations via `::view-transition-old/new/group/image-pair(.your-class)`; keep class names aligned with `enter`/`exit`/`share` string or map values.
